teams.name: AeroDesign
teams.status_detail: APPLICATIONS ARE CURRENTLY CLOSED. Next recruitment cycle begins in August 2026.
teams.summary: UBC AeroDesign is currently closed to applications and will reopen recruitment in August 2026. The team welcomes all UBC undergraduate and graduate students to apply for technical and administrative positions working on remotely-piloted aircraft and autonomous drone projects.
